name: rootflowai-image
description: Generate images through the RootFlowAI images API and save them locally.

interface.longDescription: Create images with the RootFlowAI-compatible images API, using a bundled workflow that handles auth, request formatting, response parsing, and saving files to disk.
defaultPrompt: Generate an image through RootFlowAI with my prompt and save it locally.
Create two RootFlowAI images in a cinematic style and keep the raw response.
Use RootFlowAI to iterate on an image prompt and write the files to my workspace.
